title: Agent Squad — per-agent config
description: Schema for agents/<id>/agent.json inside a squad bundle. Mirrors the subset of OpenClaw's agents.list[] that squad bundles may declare. See https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/config-agents for the canonical OpenClaw spec.

id.description: Kebab-case, must match the agents/<id>/ directory name and the entry in manifest.json#/agents.

description.description: One-line role description — what this agent owns. Shown in catalog tooling and at runtime.

model.description: Strict enum. Defaults to the pod's agents.defaults when omitted.

heartbeat.description: OpenClaw heartbeat config — mirrors agents.defaults.heartbeat / agents.list[].heartbeat in OpenClaw. Every sub-field is optional; omitted values inherit from the pod's agents.defaults.heartbeat. When the heartbeat object is present, agents/<id>/HEARTBEAT.md must exist.

every.description: Duration string in OpenClaw format — units ms / s / m / h. e.g. "30m", "2h", "24h". Set "0m" to disable. Named values like "daily" are not valid.

model.description: Override the agent-level model just for heartbeat runs. Free-form OpenClaw model id (provider/model or a configured alias).

skills.description: Bundle-relative paths to agent-specific skill files.

contextInjection.description: OpenClaw context-injection mode. Optional — pod default applies when omitted.

bootstrapMaxChars.description: OpenClaw bootstrap budget in characters. Optional — pod default applies when omitted.

params.description: Provider-level params passed through to OpenClaw (e.g. cacheRetention). Free-form.
